chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Rev. App. No. S – 06 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on MA No.461/2022 (Limitation Act) 3. For hearing of main case 20.11.2023 None present. No intimation is received. Since filing of this revision application in 2022, the record reflects that most of the time this application has been adjourned, which shows lack of interest by Counsel for the applicant. Accordingly, this revision application is dismissed in non-prosecution along with listed application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
